scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @persona/api" "npm run dev -w @persona/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @persona/shared && npm run build -w @persona/api && npm run build -w @persona/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @persona/shared && npm run typecheck -w @persona/api && npm run typecheck -w @persona/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @persona/shared && npm run lint -w @persona/api && npm run lint -w @persona/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @persona/shared && npm run test -w @persona/api && npm run test -w @persona/web
